name: Riposte
description: 'Parry this you filthy casual.' You hail from a lineage of blade masters, forged in ash. Your skills with any blade have been honed by years of toil and trouble, being able to repel any attacks directed at you and to close the distance against fleeing foes with a rapid dash. Your skills can be unnaturally enhanced through the power of relic coins that overcharge and empower your attacks.
